scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm run start" "cd frontend && npm run preview -- --port 3000 --host 0.0.0.0"
